query: Which model and effort tier should this Jira dispatch run at? Check the labels first.
note: Resolving model/effort from labels is the fields control-plane's core job.

query: Set PROJ-123 to Highest priority and pin it to opus
note: Native Priority field + agent-model-opus label are this skill's taxonomy.

query: Add the agent-effort-high label to this ticket so the agent works carefully
note: agent-effort-* label semantics (prose transport into the prompt) live here.

query: Put a hold on this Jira issue so no orchestrator dispatches it — humans only
note: do-not-dispatch operator hold is defined and operated by the fields skill.

query: What issue type should I pick for this — bug, story, or task — and what Priority?
note: Issue-type + Priority selection is the control-plane taxonomy.

query: In our Jira project, set the Priority field and the agent-model label on PROJ-77 before I dispatch it.
We're standing up a new Jira project — what fields and labels does the orchestration control plane need?
note: Setting up fields/labels in a new Jira project is the setup section here.

query: The issue carries agent-model-opus but my session has no opus access — what now?
note: Access-gated model fallback (release claim, leave the label) is fields-skill specific.

query: Before I dispatch a Jira issue, which fields and labels control the model and effort tier?
Lock PROJ-123 with the agent-claimed label and a lock comment before dispatching
note: The claim/lock/release PROTOCOL behind agent-claimed lives in the locking sibling.

query: File a Jira issue for this bug with verified file:line refs and acceptance criteria
note: Writing the groomed issue body is filing, not the field/label control plane.

query: Add the agent-model:opus and agent-effort:high labels to GitHub issue #88
note: Cross-tracker confuser: GitHub issue # and colon-style labels -> gh-issue-labels.

query: Run scripts/bootstrap-labels.sh to create the agent label set on GitHub
note: The bootstrap script is the GitHub sibling; the Jira fields skill ships none.

query: Why isn't my PR merging — it's green but stuck, and auto-merge dropped
note: Post-open PR merge lifecycle is driving-prs-to-merge, not the issue field plane.

query: Dispatch a sub-agent at PROJ-205 and write the eight-section dispatch brief
note: The dispatch brief itself is dispatching-subagents; fields only feed model/effort into it.

query: Recon PROJ-300 and give me an implementation approach plus an LoE estimate
note: Dev-side recon + LoE is technical-recon, not field/label control.

query: Keep 6 agents running, fill slots P0-first, and back off when the queue jams
note: The slot loop reads these fields but the loop itself is orchestrating-slots.

query: Build a pitch deck for the quarterly review with a title slide and agenda
note: Truly unrelated presentation task — no Jira fields or labels involved.
